title: Living with Evangelion characters
wikitext:
[]: Living with Evangelion characters             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Wed Jul 14, 2004 11:51 am Harmless speculation. If you had to live with one Evangelion character, who would you choose. And how would you put up with their respective pet peeves? (Asuka's bitching, Hikari's bossiness, Touji hitting on a girl you like, or your hot mom, Misato drinking all your bear, Shinji's mental breakdowns, Ritsuko's lectures, Rei's tendency to walk around naked, etc. etc. etc.)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 14, 2004 11:56 am Misato, the pretty face gets me every time Half the time i'd be drinking with her until i realized why she's drinking

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Wed Jul 14, 2004 12:09 pm Shinji: He's the least invasive and I feel that i could get along with him more than Asuka. And when he becomes mentally unstable all you have to do is drop him off at the mental hospital for a while

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Wed Jul 14, 2004 12:44 pm Oh god this is a pathetic thread -_- Ah what the heck. I'd live with Rei cuz i don't mind her walking around naked.. And she's quiet and not annoying like the rest of the Evangelion cast.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jul 14, 2004 1:07 pm i'd live with Shinji because he cooks well and he never complains about something.

[]:             Quote Post by Grip_Tight_Thin » Wed Jul 14, 2004 1:21 pm Either Shinji for his cooking and companionship. I would like to live with Asuka but I doubt I could handle it...so Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Jul 14, 2004 3:43 pm Misato 1. She's pretty 2. She's not jail bait 3. I hate beer so she can have it all anyways (although they are more fun when sober ) 4. I lived in a coed college house with 8 friends- I already know what it would be like.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jul 14, 2004 4:10 pm Hmmmm though decision, definately a women for companionship and other "needs." But who...........? I have to go with Misato because we could drink, laugh, drink, talk, 'play around' and get drunk some more............Did I mention drinking?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Wed Jul 14, 2004 4:39 pm Yea i'll say Misato on this one, because Asuka is too young.

[]:             Quote Post by secondson » Wed Jul 14, 2004 5:23 pm No one - no way, no how. I have enough trouble with my real-life roommates, thank you very much :?

[]:             Quote Post by Asterix » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:26 pm If the whole age thing weren't a factor, I would say Asuka. I would want to be stuck living with somebody that would actually talk, which I don't think Rei or Shinji could be trusted to do (sorta like Shinji being glad he's not stuck with Rei in the manga - can you say total lack of conversation?) As for the bitchy factor, I enjoy listening to people's problems. Of the adults, probably Hyuga, so we can be geeks together.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:38 pm Engh -_- I'd love to say Shinji for his remarkable ability to cook and clean... but then he'd be subject to much abuse. So I'll go with Asuka. She throws a fit and locks herself up in her room for the night. I could deal with that.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:40 pm max3000 wrote: Oh god this is a pathetic thread -_-

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:43 pm I'd go with Misato. She's not too much older than I am and we would have a good time getting drunk every night. I don't mind living in filth.

[]:             Quote Post by Grip_Tight_Thin » Wed Jul 14, 2004 8:54 pm Asuka Langley wrote: Engh -_- I'd love to say Shinji for his remarkable ability to cook and clean... but then he'd be subject to much abuse. So I'll go with Asuka. She throws a fit and locks herself up in her room for the night. I could deal with that.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 14, 2004 9:00 pm And so am I. That just solidifies my 'live with Asuka' statement.

[]:             Quote Post by Slade » Wed Jul 14, 2004 9:25 pm I think living with Misato would be a very interesting experience. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Jul 14, 2004 9:37 pm i dont think i could handle Misato's behavior...to much mess... Rei or Asuka for me... especially if Rei walks around naked all the time jk i'd prefer Asuka though....more to talk and argue about... and Shinji as a housemaid/butler?

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Wed Jul 14, 2004 11:57 pm I'll live with any of them. My fav would be Misato of course But I kinda like girls that are bitchy like Asuka too. Shinji is fine, cause he can cook and would be an easy roomate to have. Rei is easy to get along with too. Toji would be fun to play sports with. Hikari would make me more responsible. Kaji would be my role model. Maya would be a great friend to have 8) . Any of em are fine with me! Except Ritsko and Gendo. They scare me.

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Thu Jul 15, 2004 9:43 am I would say Shinji, but I have such a hard time helping people with their problems. Shinji would be a close second. I'd say Rei because she's calm and quiet. I'd probably relate to her a little more.
